privileged_info_summary: This is a synthetic task for creating a Behavior Tree diagram in draw.io based on a zombie guard NPC specification. The specification defines 4 priority behaviors (Self-Preservation, Combat, Investigate, Idle) with a hierarchical structure using Selector and Sequence control nodes. The minimum node count of 15 is verified against an expected tree with 24+ nodes. All 10 required text elements (Health, 20%, Selector, Sequence, Player Visible, Bite, Spit, Noise, Idle, Wander) are present in the specification. The style colors are verified: condition nodes use #fff2cc (light yellow), action nodes use #dae8fc (light blue), and control nodes use #f5f5f5 (light grey). All metadata claims are consistent with the setup scripts and specification files that define the task.
